summary: Verified iteration_10 fixes. BOTH fixes FAILED. (1) Emergent badge is still present in DOM on every route tested (/, /admin, /catalog, /about) and 'Made with Emergent' text is still visible in the bottom-right corner (confirmed via screenshot). The useEffect DOM removal is not effective. (2) Hero trust-row label still reads 'ESTABLISHED' — 'Founded' was not found anywhere in body innerText and screenshot confirms 'ESTABLISHED' label. Regression checks all pass: nav-admin hidden, /admin loads directly, ProductCards have equal heights (594.47px x 13 cards) with view + quick-add buttons, no horizontal overflow at any of 1920/1440/1024/768/390 viewports, /catalog + /about + /catalogue?print=1 all load.
passed: nav-admin element not present in DOM
ProductCards: 13 cards, equal heights (594.47px), view + quick-add buttons present

failed.issue: #emergent-badge element is STILL present in DOM on / after 2.5s wait, and also on /admin, /catalog, /about. 'Made with Emergent' text is still visible at bottom-right of every page (confirmed in screenshot).
failed.evidence: document.getElementById('emergent-badge') returned true on all 4 tested routes; body.innerText.includes('made with emergent') returned true on homepage; screenshot shows 'Made with Emergent' pill at bottom-right corner.

failed.issue: Label still reads 'ESTABLISHED' — was not renamed to 'Founded'. Text search for both 'Founded' and 'Established' returned false in innerText scan (likely due to uppercase text-transform normalizing case), but the screenshot unambiguously shows 'ESTABLISHED' beneath the '1981' value.
failed.evidence: Screenshot /home_hero.png shows '1981 / ESTABLISHED' in the trust-row instead of '1981 / FOUNDED'. body.innerText search: founded=False.

action_items: The App.js useEffect that removes #emergent-badge is not executing OR the badge is being re-injected by a script that runs later than the 5s polling window. Recommend: (a) verify the useEffect is actually attached and firing (add a console.log), (b) add a MutationObserver on document.body that removes any element with id='emergent-badge' whenever it is added — this is the robust fix. Note the badge is likely injected by the Emergent preview environment via a script tag/postMessage, so a persistent observer is required, not a one-shot timer.

The 'Established' -> 'Founded' rename does not appear to have been applied to Home.jsx. Please open /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx, locate the trust-row label under the '1981' value, and change the string from 'Established' to 'Founded'. Verify HMR picked it up (or restart frontend if needed).

success_rate.frontend: 8/10 checks passed (both new fixes failed, all regressions passed)
